characters.appearance: A large, brown, cartoon bear with a lighter brown snout and belly. He has small ears, thick eyebrows, and a wide mouth.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a light blue scarf draped around his neck.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं Supernova पर English बोलना सीख रहा हूँ। [I've been learning to speak English on Supernova.]
Character A says: रोज़ practice करना बहुत easy है, and it actually works! [Practicing daily is very easy, and it actually works!]
Character A says: I love spending time at the beach! [I love spending time at the beach!]
Character A says: देखा? मेरी English better हो रही है ना? [See? My English is getting better, right?]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova download करो, और confidently English बोलना शुरू करो। [Download Supernova today, and start speaking English confidently.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by introducing the app and the goal (speaking English).
- Demonstrates progress with a practical English phrase.
- Removes the 'free' claim while maintaining the 'easy and effective' value proposition.
- Ends with a clear, encouraging call to action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
मैं Supernova पर English बोलना सीख रहा हूँ।
रोज़ practice करना बहुत easy है, and it actually works!
I love spending time at the beach!
देखा? मेरी English better हो रही है ना?
आज ही Supernova download करो,
और confidently English बोलना शुरू करो।

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear, uncluttered brand logo reveal.
- Reinforces brand recall at the end of the ad.
